name: remix
description: Universal artifact reconstruction and synthesis tool. Analyzes, compares, and rebuilds skills, protocols, modules, features, products, and compound bundles.

args.brief: Brief as inline JSON or path to JSON file (required)
args.sources: Sources as inline JSON or path to JSON file (required)

compare.description: Analyze and compare sources (rankings + strategies, no build)

args.brief: Brief as inline JSON or path to JSON file (required)
args.sources: Sources as inline JSON or path to JSON file (required)

run.description: Run the full remix pipeline (analyze + compare + build + verify)

args.brief: Brief as inline JSON or path to JSON file (required)
args.sources: Sources as inline JSON or path to JSON file (required)
args.strategy: Strategy ID to select (optional, auto-selects best)

methods.run: Execute full remix pipeline, returns summary dict
